properties.name: conductor.file-storage.gcs.bucket-name
properties.description: GCS bucket name where files are stored.

properties.name: conductor.file-storage.gcs.project-id
properties.description: Google Cloud project ID that owns the bucket.

properties.name: conductor.file-storage.gcs.credentials-file
properties.description: Path to a service account JSON key file. If omitted, falls back to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS or the Application Default Credentials chain.
